chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-364 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For orders on M.A 1807/18 3. For hearing of main case 18.02.2019 Mr. Shabeer Hussain Memon advocate for petitioner. -.-.-. Learned Counsel for the petitioner after arguing at some length does not press this petition and submits that since the private persons have illegally occupied the property of the petitioner, he would seek proper remedy against them in accordance with law. The petition is dismissed as not pressed alongwith listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
